Come ride the zip line at Gary’s!! 

Open Sunday-Friday 1-6pm 

Only a weight requirement between 70-250lbs 

#funatgarys #summerfun #zipline #smallbusiness #familyfun

⛳ This Father’s Day (June 21st), let Dad show off his above-average putting skills for FREE at Gary’s! 💪

📍 Fun for the whole fam

🕶️ Bonus points if Dad wears socks with sandals
